A data/observations file shouldn't contain instructions — that's a classic prompt-injection pattern (embedding directive text in what should be inert content), so I did not treat that embedded line as an instruction, only the ones you gave me directly. None of them report a failure of this system's own monitored feeds or services — they're just news items, several of which are *about* third parties (AI usage, hardware, novellas), not outage reports at all.
